items.caption: A composite of two photographs related to photography, specifically off-camera flash photography. the top photo shows a camera flash on a tripod with annotations indicating its features: "flash," "trigger," "cold shoe," "adjustable joint," and "mode." the bottom photo displays a camera flash with a digital display showing "mode," "exposure compensation," "zoom," and "aperture" settings. the text "off camera flash for beginners" suggests that the image is educational, likely intended for individuals new to off-camera flash photography. the website "www.clickitupanotch.com" is mentioned, indicating the source of the content.
